aiSettings.title: AI Agent
aiSettings.description: Configure the AI that answers customer questions automatically.
aiSettings.modelHelp: Leave blank to use the provider default.
aiSettings.keyRemoved: Key will be removed on save
aiSettings.greetingPlaceholder: Hi! I can help you find answers. What would you like to know?
aiSettings.instructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Always be polite and refer to our refund policy...
aiSettings.instructionsHelp: Additional instructions for the AI agent.
aiSettings.encryptedAtRestEnv: Encrypted at rest. Leave blank to use server environment variables.
aiSettings.productContextPlaceholder: We build a project management tool for remote teams. Key features: boards, sprints, tasks. Users: developers and PMs. Tone: friendly, concise, action-oriented.
aiSettings.escalationHelp: Hand off to a human agent when AI confidence is below this level.
aiSettings.productContextLabel: Describe your product for AI article generation
aiSettings.productContextHelp: AI uses this when drafting KB articles automatically.
aiSettings.autoDraftQuestionsHelp: Draft articles when customers ask questions AI cannot answer.
aiSettings.autoDraftThresholdHelp: Minimum number of times a question must be asked before an article is drafted.
aiSettings.autoDraftCodeHelp: Allow GitHub Actions and CI pipelines to draft articles via API key.
aiSettings.batchWindowHelp: When using a shared feature ID across repos, wait this long after the last PR before generating.

sync.syncFailed: Sync failed — check OPENAI_API_KEY and QDRANT_URL
sync.syncHelp: Required for AI-powered search. Run after publishing or updating articles.

workspace.demoDisabled: Workspace settings cannot be changed in demo mode.
workspace.name: Name
workspace.customDomainHelp: Point a CNAME record at this server, then enter the domain here. Routing activates automatically once DNS propagates.
workspace.logoHelp: Supports https://, http://, root-relative paths, or data image URLs. Square logos are fine; they render without cropping.
workspace.logoFaviconWarning: This looks like a favicon or icon asset. Use a fuller company logo here if you have one.
workspace.logoMatchesFavicon: Logo and favicon are using the same asset. That usually makes the main brand feel too small.
workspace.logoPreviewHelp: Displayed across your help center, dashboard, and widget surfaces.
workspace.brandWordmarkHelp: Optional. Use this when you don't have a logo image and want to render branded text instead. If left blank, we use the workspace name.
workspace.brandFontFamilyHelp: Used only for the text wordmark when no logo image is uploaded.
workspace.brandFontUrlHelp: Optional. Required only when the brand font is not already available on the page.
workspace.wordmarkPreviewHelp: Used when a workspace prefers text branding over an image logo.
workspace.faviconHelp: Used for the browser tab icon. Falls back to your company logo if empty.
workspace.faviconPreviewHelp: Shown in browser tabs and bookmarks.
workspace.metaTitleHelp: Displayed in browser tabs and search results.
workspace.metaDescriptionPlaceholder: Support docs, guides, and answers for {name}.
workspace.metaDescriptionHelp: Used by search engines and link previews for your public help center.

themePicker.fontTooltip: Use the font pairing bundled with the selected theme to keep heading and body fonts in sync, or pick a custom pairing below.
themePicker.fontPreview: Help articles, search, and AI answers
themePicker.companyColorsHelp: Override any theme token with your own brand colors and corner radius.
themePicker.customFontOverrideHelp: Themes use separate heading and body fonts. Custom branding should follow that same split.
themePicker.bodyFontPreview: Search, articles, navigation, and AI responses use the body font.
themePicker.demoBranding: Branding changes cannot be saved in demo mode.

aiThemeGenerator.title: Generate with AI
aiThemeGenerator.description: Describe your brand and Claude generates a matching palette.
aiThemeGenerator.placeholder: e.g. A fintech startup focused on personal finance. Professional and trustworthy, with deep navy blues and gold accents. Minimal rounded corners.
